title: Anonymous Whistleblower Submission Platform with ZK Proofs
problem_statement: Existing whistleblower platforms (SecureDrop, GlobaLeaks) require trust in the receiving organization's infrastructure. If the server is compromised or the organization is coerced, whistleblower identities can be exposed retroactively.
proposed_solution: A submission platform where the whistleblower proves organizational affiliation (e.g., 'I work at Company X') via zero-knowledge proof without revealing their specific identity. Submissions are end-to-end encrypted and stored on decentralized infrastructure.
mvp_scope: Web app with ZK credential verification for a single employer domain. E2E encrypted submission box. Decentralized storage via IPFS pinning.
threat_model: Employer with IT department access. Government with legal authority to compel server operators. Nation-state adversary with traffic analysis capabilities.
open_questions: How to issue ZK-compatible credentials without employer cooperation?
Acceptable UX complexity for high-risk users?
